title: Vercel — Develop. Preview. Ship.
description: T660 / T73 cycle 3: vercel.com landing rebuilt as a Forge CmsPage. Third marketing-site rebuild — tests the gap dedup theory to threshold.

sections.title: Develop. Preview. Ship.
sections.lede: Vercel gives you the developer tools and cloud infrastructure to build, scale, and secure a faster, more personalized web.

sections.title: GAP-T660-4 (re-surfaced) — LogoWall on three rebuilds
body: Vercel's homepage has a customer logo strip near the top (Adobe, Stripe, Nike, Sonos, Notion, Loom, Eventbrite, Suno, Runway). Same gap as Stripe + Linear. Dedup table now confirms LogoWall on 3-of-3 marketing rebuilds + 1 animated rebuild = 4 surfaces total. PRIORITY 1 for the T70 backlog.

items.value: Built by Vercel. Zero-config deploys, ISR, edge functions, App Router.
First-class adapter; server endpoints + edge-rendered routes.
Vue 3 framework with hybrid rendering, image optimization, Nitro server.
Content-first MPA with islands; deploys to Edge or Serverless.
Loader / action server runtime with Vercel-native streaming.
All 40+ frameworks via the standard Vercel adapter.

sections.text: Preview every change before it ships

sections.heading: From local to production in one push

items.title: Preview Deployments — every commit, every PR
items.host_sub: Unique URL per branch; comment + screenshot on PRs

items.title: Visual Editing — design + content in production
items.host_sub: Live-edit Sanity, Contentful, Storyblok content in the deployed site

items.title: Comments — review on the deploy itself
items.host_sub: Pin a comment to any element on any preview URL

items.title: Logs + observability — every request traced
items.host_sub: Live function logs, runtime errors, Edge cache stats

sections.title: GAP-T660-NEW2 — Code/Terminal snippet block
body: Vercel's homepage has a recurring `npx vercel`-style terminal-output block illustrating the deploy flow. Forge has NO code-block CmsSection variant. Adding it (CmsSection::Code { lang, code, line_highlights, terminal: bool }) would also serve dev-product marketing sites (Stripe API docs callouts, Linear API screenshots).
Stripe also had inline code snippets in its docs section — surfaced as warn-not-strict back then; bumping to known gap now.

sections.text: Ship with confidence at any scale

sections.title: Performance — edge-native by default
body: Every deployment runs on the Vercel Edge Network: 40+ regions worldwide, sub-50ms cold starts on Edge Functions, automatic image + font optimization, ISR for hybrid SSG + dynamic routes.
Core Web Vitals tracked in the Vercel Analytics dashboard with per-route breakdowns.

sections.title: GAP-T660-1 (re-surfaced) — Pricing tier-cards (3-of-3)
body: Vercel pricing teaser shows Hobby / Pro / Enterprise. Same priority bump as Linear + Stripe. Pricing variant now 3-of-3 marketing rebuilds. PRIORITY 2 in the T70 backlog (tied with Quote).

sections.title: Built for collaborative engineering teams
body: Teams use Vercel for monorepo deploys, RBAC, environment-variable scopes, audit logs, SSO, deployment protection, custom domains, secret rotation, and the Vercel CLI in CI.
Linear, Stripe, Adobe, Sonos, Eventbrite, Suno, Runway, Notion, McDonald's, Patreon — all running on Vercel.

sections.text: T660 dedup confirmed at 3-of-3: LogoWall, Pricing, Quote all needed by every marketing rebuild. Code/Terminal block now 2-of-3 (Stripe + Vercel). T70 priority order locked.
